example_en: She felt relief after the exam.
He felt regret about his decision.
She showed sympathy to her friend.
His face turned red with embarrassment.
Too much stress is bad for health.
example_ru: Слишком сильный стресс вреден для здоровья.

example_en: I have no doubt about it.
example_ru: У меня нет сомнений в этом.

example_en: He had a strong desire to travel.
example_ru: У него было сильное желание путешествовать.

example_en: She looked at the mess with disgust.
example_ru: Она посмотрела на беспорядок с отвращением.

example_en: It was a pleasure to meet you.
There was tension in the room.
The view filled us with wonder.
He acquired new skills at work.
example_ru: Он приобрёл новые навыки на работе.

example_en: It takes time to adapt to a new country.
example_ru: Нужно время, чтобы адаптироваться к новой стране.

example_en: The doctor advised me to rest.
We arranged a meeting for Friday.
She claimed that she was innocent.
This job combines travel and teaching.

example_en: She wrote an essay about climate change.
example_ru: Она написала эссе об изменении климата.

example_en: Each paragraph has one main idea.
example_ru: В каждом абзаце одна главная мысль.

example_en: Write a summary of the article.
Add a reference at the end.
Use a citation for this fact.
Give a clear definition of the term.
This term is used in biology.
Choose a topic for your essay.
The thesis is stated in the introduction.
They live in an apartment block.
We paid a deposit for the flat.
The utility bill is higher in winter.
example_ru: Счёт за коммунальные услуги выше зимой.

example_en: The water supply stopped for an hour.
Maintenance is included in the rent.
Put paper in the recycling bin.
example_ru: Положи бумагу в контейнер для переработки.
Я езжу на работу на поезде.

example_en: The village lies in a valley.
They live on a small island.
A big wave hit the boat.
The cave was dark and cold.
The area is rich in wildlife.
A strange creature appeared in the story.
Forests are a habitat for many animals.
The air was hot and humid.
Try to see the problem from her perspective.
example_ru: Попробуй увидеть проблему с её точки зрения.

example_en: Add a supporting detail to your paragraph.
There is a contradiction in your answer.
Try to use a neutral tone.
A noun can name a person or thing.
example_ru: Существительное может называть человека или предмет.

example_en: An adverb can describe a verb.
A pronoun can replace a noun.
A preposition shows a relationship between words.
A conjunction joins words or clauses.
example_ru: Союз соединяет слова или части предложения.

example_en: A clause has a subject and a verb.
example_ru: В части предложения есть подлежащее и глагол.

example_en: This phrase is common in speech.
example_ru: Эта фраза часто встречается в речи.
В английском есть несколько времён глагола.
Здесь используй глагол в единственном числе.

example_en: Passive voice is common in formal writing.
example_ru: Пассивный залог часто используется в формальном письме.

example_en: Reported speech changes the original words.
The result depends on one condition.
There is one exception to the rule.
We need to evaluate the results.
Are you aware of the risks?
She is capable of hard work.
Use formal language in this email.
example_ru: Используй формальный язык в этом письме.

example_en: The company hired an external expert.
The virus is invisible to the eye.
The complexity of the task surprised us.
Experience is a requirement for this job.
example_ru: Опыт является требованием для этой работы.

example_en: I had no intention to hurt you.
Motivation helps you study every day.
The company is a solution provider.

The shop checks inventory every week.
The invoice was sent by email.
The laptop has a two-year warranty.
The building is a valuable asset.

example_en: A high percentage of students passed.

example_en: Put each word into a category.
